title: nuphar advena subsp. variegata
intro: Nuphar advena subsp. variegata, also known as the variegated water lily or yellow pond lily, is a subspecies of aquatic plant native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Nuphar advena subsp. variegata include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating digestive issues. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
